description_long: This is a four-story urban bakery building with a flat roof, featuring a prominent water tower and a rooftop access structure. The facade is adorned with decorative brickwork, arched window frames, and a green-and-yellow striped awning above the main entrance. The ground floor has large display windows and a double-door entrance, while the upper floors have regularly spaced windows with subtle ledges. A metal fire escape runs along one side of the building, and the sidewalk in front includes a streetlamp, trash cans, a fire hydrant, and a crosswalk. The rooftop also features a satellite dish and utility pipes, adding to the urban character.
description: A four-story urban bakery with decorative brickwork, striped awning, rooftop water tower, and a side fire escape, set on a city sidewalk.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, striped awning, large display windows, and sidewalk details including a streetlamp and trash cans.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the metal fire escape, water tower, and rooftop details, with less emphasis on the storefront.
description_view_2: Rear view showing plain brickwork, regular windows, and the side profile of the fire escape and rooftop structures.
description_view_3: Back view with minimal architectural detail, showing the building's rear windows and rooftop elements.
attribute_storefront_signage: None. There is no visible signage with text, logos, or branding on the storefront; only a striped awning is present above the entrance.
attribute_display_window_with_baked_good: None. The display windows are present but do not visibly feature any baked goods or displays from the exterior.
attribute_awning_with_bakery_branding: A green-and-yellow striped awning is present above the storefront entrance. It is rectangular, made of fabric or similar material, and does not feature any visible bakery branding, logos, or text.
attribute_outdoor_seating_area: None. There is no outdoor seating area visible in front of or adjacent to the bakery.
attribute_architectural_style: The building features elements of Early 20th Century Urban Commercial architecture, with decorative brickwork, arched window frames, a flat roof, and a prominent metal fire escape. The style is utilitarian with modest ornamentation typical of older city neighborhoods.
